THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIMBO, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEIS, EDGAR C. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEIS, EDGAR C. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BIMBO, MICHAEL $773.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $795.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
